items.title: 'Superman' Flies Past $400 Million But Falters Overseas, While 'Jurassic World Rebirth' Charges Toward $650 Million In A Red-Hot Summer Box Office Battle
items.description: Warner Bros.' Superman crossed $400 million globally despite weak overseas performance, while Universal's Jurassic World Rebirth nears $650 million in a competitive summer box office season led by major franchise films.

items.title: The stock market is being led by a new group of winners
items.description: There's a new group of big winners emerging.

items.title: 3 High-Conviction Picks I Just Bought More Of For The Dividend Income Accelerator Portfolio
items.description: I added additional shares of Alphabet, PepsiCo, and the SCHD ETF to our portfolio to optimize our portfolio's risk-reward, income, and growth balance. Read the update.

items.title: Tesla loses its charm for India’s loyalists — even as Musk finally delivers
items.description: Tesla's debut in India has not convinced its early backers, who waited for the company to enter the market for nearly a decade.

items.title: 1 Incredible Reason to Buy This Value Stock Before Wall Street Catches On
items.description: Qualcomm has struggled amid the upcoming loss of a major customer and heavy China exposure.  The company's emerging product lines arguably give investors good reason to take advantage of its low valuation.  In recent years, investors have largely overlooked Qualcomm (NASDAQ: QCOM) stock.

items.title: If You Buy Apple With $10,000 in 2025, Will You Become a Millionaire in 10 Years?
items.description: Apple's ability to introduce inventive products and easy-to-use software has created a loyal following among consumers across the globe.  Worries about tariffs and slow progress with artificial intelligence (AI) might be the key factors on the minds of investors these days.  If you buy Apple shares today with $10,000, will that starting sum turn into $1 million by 2035?

items.title: MP Materials (MP) Soars 40% on Multi-Billio Dollar Deals
items.description: We recently published 10 Stocks With Unbelievable Gains This Week. MP Materials Corp. (NYSE:MP) is one of this week’s biggest players. MP Materials climbed by 40.15 percent week-on-week to hit a new all-time high as investors gobbled up shares after clinching a $500-million partnership with technology giant Apple Inc. At intra-day trading on Friday, MP Materials […]
